# ai-safety-governance-dashboard

AI Safety & Governance Dashboard

## Tech Stack
- Python

## Quick Start
```bash
# Clone
git clone https://github.com/mcbuckeye/ai-safety-governance-dashboard.git
cd ai-safety-governance-dashboard

# Setup (adjust based on project)
# pip install -r requirements.txt  # Python
# npm install                      # Node

# Run
# python main.py                   # Python
# npm start                        # Node
```
